1.title: The Hidden Entrance
1.story_hook: Amara is a brave young explorer from a faraway jungle. She travels to the desert to visit her friend Tariq. They see something strange near the big stone arch. Together, they go to check out a hidden cave that appeared in the sand.

2.title: The Ruins of Ashur
2.story_hook: Amara and Tariq go deep into a cool cave. Inside, they find an old underground city called Ashur. But watch out! Bandits are hiding in the ruins, and the stones are moving like magic.

3.title: The Misty Foothills
3.story_hook: Amara and Tariq climb the cold mountain tops. They meet Kenji, a boy with a wooden sword. He needs help! Bad ninjas and a dark mist are taking over his mountain home.

4.title: Rise of the Shadow Master
4.story_hook: The mist clears, and our heroes see a big fortress. The Shadow Master lives there! You must sneak past the guards and solve puzzles to open the gates.

5.title: The Scorched Plains
5.story_hook: Amara, Tariq, and Kenji travel to the Scorched Plains and meet Zahara. It is very hot here! The lions are acting strange, and the spirits are upset. Zahara must use her magic to fix the plains.

6.title: The Spirit Realm
6.story_hook: The friends enter the Spirit Realm. A dark spell has taken over the Spirit King, making him wild and angry! You must battle him to break the spell and fix the world.

chronicle.title: The Chronicle
chronicle.mystery_path: This path remains shrouded in mystery...
chronicle.subtitle: Your Journey Through the Ages

difficulty.desc_2: Addition and subtraction up to 20, simple multiplication
difficulty.desc_3: Arithmetic up to 100 and multiplication tables
difficulty.change_later_subtitle: You can always change this in the game

sequence.instruction: Connect the stars in the correct order!

refill_canteen.instruction: Refill your canteen by choosing the right amount of water

balance.instruction: Remove stones to make both piles weigh equal!

number_path.instruction: Create a continuous path by filling in the numbers!

mirror.instruction: Rotate the runes to match the reflection!

latin_square.instruction: Put runes in the grid. Use each rune only once in every row and column.

equation.instruction: Find the value of the mystery symbol!

blade_barrier.description: Deals {{damage}} damage and shields all allies for {{duration}} turns.

landing.title: Math with Magic
landing.subtitle: Embark on an epic journey of knowledge and adventure.
landing.hero_tagline: Solve puzzles, grow magical companions, and enjoy epic adventures — all while practicing math.
landing.feature_adventures_desc: Explore magical worlds filled with hundreds of challenges and quests.
landing.feature_companions_desc: Level up Amara, Tariq, and their friends by solving math puzzles.
landing.feature_opponents_desc: Battle fearsome bosses and mysterious creatures on your journey.
landing.feature_puzzles_desc: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division — disguised as magic.
landing.footer_tagline: Making math magical for kids ages 6–8.
